creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I would like to request a repocopy of devel/gdb6 to devel/gdb66.  I wish to
update devel/gdb6 to GDB 6.8, but the WITH_INSIGHT knob and everything related
to it must be removed, so it was suggested to keep the current GDB 6.6 port as
a repocopy to devel/gdb66.
